mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.quantity, c.create_time, c.update_time, p.product_name, p.preview_image, p.sale_price, p.unit FROM ecommerce_cart c LEFT JOIN wms_product p ON c.product_id = p.product_id AND p.del_flag = '0' WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
